runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP - Recent UI Change Propagation Check

Vercel inspect showed production deployment dpl_2BqXNZmdN6VE4od2z8VENgLqjWPU created at 2026-04-28T16:47:13Z, earlier than local UI commit dcf8f413 at 2026-04-28T18:31Z.

FAIL: deployed topology/log explorer surface does not expose newly added changed-marker testids such as topology-modal-shell, log-explorer-filter-summary, log-explorer-terminal, or log-explorer-log-message.

FAIL: mobile /dashboard/ai-assistant remains on the fullscreen workspace and mobile dashboard AI sidebar still shows a visible '전체 화면으로 열기' button, so the mobile sidebar handoff/fullscreen-button removal is not deployed.
PASS: guest session, system start, dashboard base render, /api/monitoring/report network request, and Vercel usage check were normal.

This is a non-counting propagation check. It should not be treated as a product regression in the already deployed v8.11.57 baseline; it means the latest GitLab main UI commits need a Vercel production deploy before production QA can validate them.
